prompt: A candid street-fashion portrait of a young woman standing at a busy Tokyo crosswalk in daylight, framed from the upper torso up and turned slightly away from the camera so her bare shoulder is prominent. She has a short messy bob haircut in {argument name="hair color" default="platinum blonde"}, soft wispy texture, and a delicate build. She wears an airy off-shoulder blouse in {argument name="clothing color" default="white"}, made of thin semi-sheer fabric with loose drape and a romantic, lightweight feel. Place her in the foreground left-of-center, with a shallow depth of field and a crowded urban background full of pedestrians crossing the street. Behind her, include a large curved glass building with the visible sign {argument name="background sign" default="TSUTAYA"}, evoking Shibuya. Use a warm vintage film aesthetic with faded colors, noticeable grain, slight blur, soft sunlight, muted contrast, and a nostalgic analog snapshot mood. The overall tone should feel stylish, spontaneous, and cinematic, like a fashion photo captured in the middle of a bustling city.
translatedPrompt: 一张年轻女性站在繁忙的东京十字路口白天的街拍时尚肖像，取景范围为上半身，她微微背对镜头，突显出裸露的肩部。她留着一头凌乱的短波波头，发色为 {argument name="hair color" default="铂金色"}，质感轻盈柔和，身形娇小。她穿着一件 {argument name="clothing color" default="白色"} 的露肩上衣，面料轻薄半透明，垂坠感十足，营造出浪漫轻盈的氛围。将她置于画面左侧前景，采用浅景深效果，背景是熙熙攘攘的过街行人。在她身后，加入一栋带有弧形玻璃的建筑，并可见 {argument name="background sign" default="TSUTAYA"} 的标志，以此呈现涩谷风情。采用温暖的复古胶片美学，色调略显褪色，带有明显的颗粒感、轻微模糊、柔和的阳光、柔和的对比度，以及怀旧的模拟快照氛围。整体基调应显得时尚、自然且具有电影感，如同在繁华都市中抓拍的时尚大片。

breakdown.creativeCore: 复古涩谷街头肖像：此提示词可生成一张充满怀旧时尚感的年轻女性街拍肖像，背景为繁忙的东京十字路口，非常适合 AI 杂志美学及街头摄影风格的图像创作。
breakdown.subject: 人物
breakdown.bestUse: 怀旧照片、纪实场景、人物生活方式、品牌氛围图

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 摄影/真实场景 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[景别/角度/版式层级/主体位置]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: cinematic, vintage]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: shallow depth, depth of field, camera]。

Text requirements:
包含文字或排版元素。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
